title: The Residual Stream: How Information Flows Through Blocks

cues.label: Continuity path
cues.headline: The residual stream carries the hidden-state matrix forward
cues.narration: The audio starts by naming the residual stream as the continuity path. The visual keeps the incoming hidden rows visible instead of replacing them.

cues.label: Update, not replacement
cues.headline: A sublayer contributes a delta, not a whole new row
cues.narration: This segment explains why addition matters. Attention and the MLP add useful deltas while token identity and prior evidence remain available.

cues.label: Shared notebook
cues.headline: Sublayers annotate the same stream
cues.narration: The notebook metaphor is useful only if the page size stays fixed. Notes are added to the stream, but the underlying row format is preserved.

cues.label: Shape stability
cues.headline: The row count and hidden width stay unchanged
cues.narration: The audio now emphasizes the strict shape rule. The post-attention and post-MLP matrices keep the same L by d_model interface.

cues.label: Pre-LN read
cues.headline: LayerNorm stabilizes what the sublayer reads
cues.narration: LayerNorm gives the sublayer a steadier view. The residual path still carries the continuing state that receives the update.

cues.label: Attention add
cues.headline: Attention adds cross-token context to the stream
cues.narration: This segment distinguishes the attention update from the representation itself. Attention adds context gathered from other token rows.

cues.label: MLP add
cues.headline: The MLP adds a same-width per-token update
cues.narration: The MLP makes the same residual move after attention. It reads each normalized row and returns an update that fits back into the same row.

cues.label: Stacking rule
cues.headline: Blocks can stack because every block returns the same shape
cues.narration: The visual now shows the contract between blocks. Values change, but the next block receives the same kind of matrix.

cues.label: Residual summary
cues.headline: Residuals preserve the thread while updates accumulate
cues.narration: The section closes by summarizing residuals as additive continuity: old signal plus attention update plus MLP update.
